# PRODUCT_SPEC.md

# AI Semester Sim

## Elevator Pitch
AI Semester Sim is a browser-based open-world life simulation game where players navigate a small campus, complete short AI-focused courses, interact with lightweight AI-driven NPCs, and finish the semester with a beginner-friendly portfolio project package they can publish to GitHub.

## Core Player Fantasy
Learn AI basics, survive a short semester, balance your time and energy, and graduate with a real starter project.

## MVP Outcome
By the end of the semester, the player should have:
- completed 3 beginner-friendly AI courses
- improved key stats
- made meaningful choices
- built a final portfolio project package
- received GitHub-ready output

## Core Loop
1. Walk to a campus location
2. Trigger an interaction
3. Complete a short lesson or action
4. Gain progress, stats, and unlocks
5. Improve the final project
6. Advance through the semester

## MVP Locations
- Dorm
- Classroom
- Library
- Cafe
- Lab
- Advisor Office

## MVP Courses
1. AI Foundations
2. Data and Prompting Basics
3. Build Your First AI Study Helper

## Final Project
A beginner-friendly AI Study Helper project package containing:
- title
- problem statement
- feature list
- starter README
- suggested folder structure
- what-I-learned summary

## Design Goals
- short and rewarding sessions
- clean visual feedback
- strong progress feeling
- replayable but easy to understand
- polished portfolio presentation
